allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('token found' if d.get\('token'\) else 'no token'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('DB connected:', d['database']['connected']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('code'\) or d.get\('message'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), 'total:', d.get\('total'\)\)")
Bash(npx vercel@latest env add VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID production)
